title: BCCTP - 211info
text: CORNELIUS WELLNESS CENTER BCCTP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Medical benefit program through OHP for individuals needing treatment for breast cancer or cervical cancer who do not have health insurance coverage. Individuals may ask their provider to refer them to the program. 1151 N Adair Street Cornelius, OR 97113 Eligibility: People under age 65 who live in Oregon and: -Need treatment for breast cancer or cervical cancer, -Do not have minimum essential coverage for treatment, -Do not qualify for any other Medicaid programs, and -Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL). -Anyone with a diagnosis of breast or cervical cancer to apply. The program does not look at gender identity or expression. Hours: No standard hours (503) 359-5564 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 359-5564 INTAKE PROCEDURE: A referral can be made by any provider who screens for breast or cervical cancer by sending a completed application to OHP. Applications are usually processed by the next business day, Oregon Breast and Cervical Cancer Program (BCCTP) coverage begins the day a provider has made cervical cancer diagnosis. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Arabic, Cantonese, French, Haitian Creole, Hindi, Farsi, Korean, Mandarin, Nepali, Polish, Português Brasileiro, Russian, Somali, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 8am-7pm Services: Medical Care Expense Assistance * Breast Cancer Medical Care Expense Assistance * Cervical Cancer Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - WELLNESS CENTER HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CORNELIUS WELLNESS CENTER
